name: Regex Forge
description: Compiles and runs a regular expression against real sample lines with Python's standard-library `re` engine, returning exact per-line match offsets, named-group spans, compile errors, and ready-to-paste snippets. The deterministic source of truth for the RegexForge Anna App.
_comment: Dev fields (tool_id/type/enabled) are read by `anna-app dev`; publish metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type/description) by `anna-app (apps|executa) publish`. The tool_id here is a synthetic dev id and is mirrored in pyproject.toml (name + [project.scripts] key), bundle/app.js (DEV_FALLBACK_TOOL_ID), and executas/regex-coach/SKILL.md (requires.tools). At publish time `anna-app apps publish` mints a real id and writes bundle/anna-tool-ids.js. Stdlib-only Python -> instant `uv run` cold start, no dependencies. This dir is the `regex-forge` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas.
